# BonusFoundry

> Independent knowledge base for international money transfer Referral Programs, Referral Codes, Referral Links, Promo Codes, Welcome Bonuses, Signup Bonuses, corridors, and country hubs.

BonusFoundry helps users understand eligibility, qualifying transfer rules, verification requirements, payment methods, payout methods, common mistakes, troubleshooting, and official-source notes before using a money transfer referral or welcome offer.

## Main Sections

- [Providers](https://bonusfoundry.com/providers): Provider-level referral, promo, welcome bonus, eligibility, verification, support, and official-source guides.
- [Corridors](https://bonusfoundry.com/corridors): Route-specific provider comparisons by sender country, destination, payout method, and bonus opportunity.
- [Country Hubs](https://bonusfoundry.com/from/usa): Sender-country hubs for provider and corridor discovery.
- [Guides](https://bonusfoundry.com/guides): Educational guides about referral codes, promo codes, signup bonuses, missing rewards, and bonus checks.
- [FAQ](https://bonusfoundry.com/faq): Short answers to common referral, promo, eligibility, verification, country, and missing-reward questions.

## Featured Providers

- [Taptap Send](https://bonusfoundry.com/providers/taptap-send)
- [Ria](https://bonusfoundry.com/providers/ria)
- [LemFi](https://bonusfoundry.com/providers/lemfi)
- [Sendwave](https://bonusfoundry.com/providers/sendwave)
- [Remitly](https://bonusfoundry.com/providers/remitly)
- [Wise](https://bonusfoundry.com/providers/wise)
- [Paysend](https://bonusfoundry.com/providers/paysend)

- [Why a Welcome Bonus Was Not Received](https://bonusfoundry.com/guides/why-bonus-was-not-received)
